name: radar
description: Decision infrastructure for private market investors. Portfolio tracking, thesis management, deal pipeline, and bet sizing.
author: Chandler Koglmeier

scripts.test: node src/utils/test-irr.js && node src/utils/test-matching.js && node src/utils/test-recompute.js && node src/utils/test-format.js && node src/utils/test-stage.js && node src/utils/test-match.js && node src/utils/test-bet-sizing.js && node src/utils/test-analytics.js && node src/import/test-transactions.js && node src/models/test-evaluations.js && node src/models/test-investments.js && node src/lenses/test-council-parser.js && node src/lenses/test-lens-loader.js && node src/sync/test-fixtures/test-parser.js && node src/reports/test-reports.js && python3 src/analytics/test_kelly.py && python3 src/analytics/test_thesis_validation.py
